Stop.rewakeMessage:
Review this session's conversation. Decide: did it produce (A) a repeatable action worth scripting, (B) reusable knowledge/context worth noting, or (C) neither (trivial chat, one-off Q&A, already-cached work)?

If (C): say nothing, do not ask.

If (A) or (B): ask the user using AskUserQuestion with this structure:
{"questions":[{"question":"Cache this session's work for future reuse?","header":"Draft","options":[{"label":"/draft-save","description":"Save as repeatable script (bash/python command)"},{"label":"/draft-note","description":"Save as reusable context (architecture, conventions, exploration findings)"},{"label":"Skip","description":"Nothing worth caching"}],"multiSelect":false}]}

If user picks /draft-note or /draft-save, invoke that skill with --name set to a lowercase-kebab-case slug (2-4 words from task intent). If Skip, do nothing.
